hero.name: Anaelle Mathe
hero.tagline: Software engineering student at Polytechnique Montréal. I build full-stack apps and care about doing it right.

about.title: About Me
about.bio: I'm in my third year of software engineering at Polytechnique Montréal, after a preparatory year and a baccalauréat mention très bien from Lycée Saint-Paul in Angoulême. In July 2026, I'm heading to the University of Technology Sydney on exchange.
about.bio2: I like building things that work — full apps, from backend to frontend, with real users in mind. My main project is CampusLift, a student funding platform I built from scratch with Next.js, Supabase, and Stripe.
about.bio3: Outside of code, I play drums and piano, I dance, and I'm into art and the humanities. Not your typical engineer profile, and that's fine by me.

code.label: Clean code
code.desc: I write code I wouldn't be embarrassed to show in an interview.

design.label: UX that makes sense
design.desc: If it's pretty but unusable, it's failed.

human.label: Curiosity
human.desc: I'd rather understand why before coding how.

campuslift.title: CampusLift
campuslift.description: Student crowdfunding platform — project creation, Stripe payments, threaded comments, admin moderation, real-time notifications. Built solo.
campuslift.tagline: Crowdfunding platform empowering student-led campus initiatives

pankration.title: Pankration
pankration.description: Real-time multiplayer tactical RPG built for LOG2995 at Polytechnique Montréal. Grid-based map editor, turn-based combat, two game modes, AI opponents, and Socket.IO live sync.
pankration.tagline: Real-time multiplayer tactical RPG with map editor, turn-based combat, and AI opponents

robot.title: Autonomous Robot — INF1900
robot.description: Programmed an autonomous robot to navigate a black-line circuit, avoid obstacles, and return to its starting position using an ATmega324PA AVR microcontroller and state machine logic.
robot.tagline: Embedded autonomous robot with line tracking and obstacle avoidance

beyond.label: 05. beyond
beyond.title: Beyond code
beyond.subtitle: Code is only part of who I am

eai.title: E-AI — Volunteering
eai.desc: Volunteered at the E-AI summit (Entertain-AI) — international event on AI and creativity, between prototyping, experimentation and digital art.

climate.title: Climate volunteering
climate.desc: Volunteered at the Festival des Prix Solutions Climatiques (CSP) 2026 at Marché Bonsecours — the largest climate event of its kind in Canada.

datathon.title: Finance Datathon 2025
datathon.desc: Participant in a financial data analysis hackathon.

art.title: Art & humanities
art.desc: Curiosity for visual arts and the humanities. A constant source of inspiration.

music.title: Drums & Piano
music.desc: Musician who loves playing drums and piano. The rigor of rhythm feeds the rigor of code.

dance.title: Dance
dance.desc: Movement as a second language. Contemporary dance and improvisation.

contact.title: A placement, a project, a question? Write to me.
contact.subtitle: Looking for a Winter or Summer 2027 internship — ideally in full-stack development.
